metadata.name: 07_并发批处理流
metadata.description: 演示批处理节点的高并发抓取或处理能力

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["url_list"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_batch", "type": "batch_processor", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "url_list", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "url_list"]}], "arrayVariable": "{url_list}", "itemVariable": "url", "concurrency": 5}}, "label": "并发批处理器"}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {"controllerNodeId": "node_batch"}}, "label": "批处理内部容器", "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, {"id": "node_scrape", "type": "tool_executor", "position": {"x": 50, "y": 50}, "data": {"config": {"inputs": [{"name": "url", "type": "string", "source": ["node_batch", "url"]}], "toolCode": "serp_api_search", "argumentsJson": "{\"query\": \"{url}\"}", "outputVariable": "page_content"}}, "label": "抓取网页", "parentNode": "loop_body_group", "extent": "parent"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 800, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "status", "type": "string", "value": "finished", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_batch", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_batch", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_batch_loop_body_group", "type": "default", "source": "node_batch", "target": "loop_body_group", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_loop_body_group_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "loop_body_group", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["url_list"]}}, {"id": "node_batch", "type": "batch_processor", "name": "并发批处理器", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "url_list", "type": "string", "source": ["node_start", "url_list"]}], "arrayVariable": "{url_list}", "itemVariable": "url", "concurrency": 5}}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "name": "批处理内部容器", "config": {"controllerNodeId": "node_batch"}, "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, {"id": "node_scrape", "type": "tool_executor", "name": "抓取网页", "config": {"inputs": [{"name": "url", "type": "string", "source": ["node_batch", "url"]}], "toolCode": "serp_api_search", "outputVariable": "page_content", "arguments": {"query": "{url}"}}, "parentNode": "loop_body_group", "extent": "parent"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "status", "type": "string", "value": "finished", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_batch", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_batch", "target": "loop_body_group", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "loop_body_group", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
